metadata.description: winded.vertigo collective agents — Mo (CMO), PaM (project/momentum manager), cARL (research), Opsy (ops), Fin (CFO), and Biz (business development). Each pairs a persona skill with a memory MCP server backed by the shared port.windedvertigo.com memory layer.

plugins.name: mo-cmo
plugins.description: Mo — winded.vertigo's chief marketing officer. Persistent memory across conversations.

plugins.name: pam-pm
plugins.description: PaM — winded.vertigo's project and momentum manager. Tracks commitments, dependencies, and follow-ups.

plugins.name: carl-research
plugins.description: cARL — winded.vertigo's cyber agent of research and learning. Living library of evidence and findings.

plugins.name: opsy-ops
plugins.description: Opsy — winded.vertigo's operations + systems intelligence agent. live health checks, incident history, and persistent ops memory.

plugins.name: fin-cfo
plugins.description: Fin — winded.vertigo's CFO agent. live financial briefings via QBO + Gusto + Gmail, persistent action-item tracking, and decision memory.

plugins.name: biz-bd
plugins.description: Biz — winded.vertigo's business-development agent. drives the RFP Lighthouse: live pipeline + bid deadlines, go/no-go + bid decision memory, and a roadmap of available upgrades.
